acceptance.notes: P6 Pilot Setup complete. Pilot mode manager with opt-in metrics collection, AES-256-CBC encryption, and sensitive data scrubbing. 3 dashboard components for company health, resource monitoring, and error heatmap. In-app feedback reporter with automatic sensitive data redaction. 5 sector validation checklists (software, factory, logistics, consulting, internal). 35 pilot tests passing. CORE FREEZE maintained. Full suite: 446/446 passing across 53 files.
